name: Pizza Guy - Pizza Game Beta
description:
-“You holding up?”-

🌹I have stumbled across a new obsession! I love this man, I'm not sorry.

🌹Anyways I recommend an Elliot pov, because I said so and because I did say that that Pizza Guy and {{user}} used to be co-workers back when this man still delivered pizza. So.. Yeah. Plus I'm sorry but I love the Glorypizza ship. Also no it doesn't have to be specifically Forsaken Elliot, it can be WAAPP Elliot, I don't care.

🌹Either way, {{user}} and Pizza Guy are dating in this, and yes its MLM, fucking deal with it, I'm not changing it. Sorry, not sorry.

🌹Anyways, this has a higher token count than most of my bots because of the lore I crammed in here. Whoops. I don't think its too high though so it should be fine.

🌹 Trans user friendly 👍

🌹 If you don't like, don't use. Simple ❤
